name: Becton, Dickinson and Co.
h1: BD, Becton Dickinson's GCC footprint in India
lede: BD, Becton Dickinson runs four centers across four Indian cities. Gurugram, Vellore, Bengaluru and Chandigarh, covering GBS, R&D, CoE and IT, built over 31 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BD, Becton Dickinson office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: BD, Becton Dickinson GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: BD, Becton Dickinson runs 4 verified centers across 4 Indian cities (Gurugram, Vellore, Bengaluru, Chandigarh), covering GBS, R&D, CoE and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Head - Science & Technology and Adviser - Biz Development

about.description: BD, Becton Dickinson's India footprint covers Gurugram, Vellore, Bengaluru and Chandigarh, spanning GBS, R&D, CoE and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all nineteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: BD, Becton Dickinson runs GBS and 3 additional center types centers in India.
